subcodes.first_line: Say: My God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having illumined my heart with the light of Thy knowledge, and all thanksgiving be unto Thee for having guided me unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما نورت قلبی بنور معرفتک و لک الثنآء بما هدیتنی الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
